debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] LogbookBridge received title=' + $p.$title
'[GT Redistribute] PE session closed key=' + $sessionKey + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')
'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders left=' + $leftId + ' right=' + $rightId + ' station=' + $stationId + ' immediate=' + $immediate
'[GT Redistribute] PE session created key=' + $sessionKey + ' station=' + $stationId
'[GT Redistribute] Assigned DockAndPilotExchange ship=' + $leftId + ' partner=' + $rightId + ' station=' + $stationId
'[GT Redistribute] Assigned DockAndPilotExchange ship=' + $rightId + ' partner=' + $leftId + ' station=' + $stationId

'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders skipped: docking disallowed at station=' + $stationId + ' left=' + $leftId + ' right=' + $rightId + ' leftAllowed=' + $leftDockAllowed + ' rightAllowed=' + $rightDockAllowed
'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders failed: no valid rendezvous station for left=' + $leftId + ' right=' + $rightId
'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders failed: ship object missing left=' + $leftFallback + ' right=' + $rightFallback
'[GT Redistribute] PilotExchangeOrderState ship=' + $s.$ShipID + ' state=' + $s.$State + ' station=' + (if $s.$StationID? then $s.$StationID else '')

raise_lua_event.name: 'gt.executePilotSwap'
raise_lua_event.param: global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$left + '|' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$right + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid else '') + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid else '')

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE session trigger key=' + $sessionKey + ' left=' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$left + ' right=' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$right + ' station=' + $sessionStationId
'[GT Redistribute] PilotExchangeOrderState missing ship object for PE clear id=' + $s.$ShipID + ' state=' + $s.$State

do_if.value: $p? and $p.$sessionKey? and $p.$sessionKey != '' and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions? and global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $p.$sessionKey}?
(not $leftShip? or not $leftShip.exists) and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap? and $leftId? and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap.{'$' + $leftId}?
(not $rightShip? or not $rightShip.exists) and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap? and $rightId? and global.$GT_ShipIDCodeMap.{'$' + $rightId}?

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] Aborted recheck retained session key=' + $sessionKey + ' leftKeep=' + $leftKeepPE + ' rightKeep=' + $rightKeepPE

do_if.value: $ship? and $ship.exists and $ship.isclass.ship and $ship.owner == faction.player and md.GT_Ship_State_Utilities.GT_ReconcilePilotExchangeState? and ((global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange) or (global.$GT_RedistributePendingDockByShip? and $ship.idcode? and global.$GT_RedistributePendingDockByShip.{'$' + $ship.idcode}?))

$ship? and $ship.exists and $ship.isclass.ship and $ship.owner == faction.player and md.GT_Ship_State_Utilities.GT_ReconcilePilotExchangeState? and ((global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange) or (global.$GT_RedistributePendingDockByShip? and $ship.idcode? and global.$GT_RedistributePendingDockByShip.{'$' + $ship.idcode}?))

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] ReleaseDockHold received left=' + $p.$left + ' right=' + $p.$right

'[GT Redistribute] ReleaseDockHold hard-fail: missing ship object(s) leftObj=' + (if $p.$leftObj? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' rightObj=' + (if $p.$rightObj? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' left=' + (if $p.$left? then $p.$left else 'NONE') + ' right=' + (if $p.$right? then $p.$right else 'NONE')
'[GT Redistribute] ReleaseDockHold cancelling lingering order on ' + $leftShip.idcode + ' current=' + @$leftShip.order.id
'[GT Redistribute] ReleaseDockHold cancelling lingering order on ' + $rightShip.idcode + ' current=' + @$rightShip.order.id
'[GT Redistribute] ReleaseDockHold left=' + $p.$left + ' right=' + $p.$right + ' leftResolved=' + (if $leftShip? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' rightResolved=' + (if $rightShip? then 'yes' else 'no')
'[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh received left=' + $p.$left + ' right=' + $p.$right + ' attempt=' + $attempt

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh hard-fail: missing ship object(s) leftObj=' + (if $p.$leftObj? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' rightObj=' + (if $p.$rightObj? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' left=' + (if $p.$left? then $p.$left else 'NONE') + ' right=' + (if $p.$right? then $p.$right else 'NONE')
'[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh resolved left=' + (if $leftShip? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' right=' + (if $rightShip? then 'yes' else 'no')

set_value.name: $leftPilot
set_value.exact: if $leftShip? and $leftShip.exists and $leftShip.pilot? and $leftShip.pilot.exists then $leftShip.pilot else null

set_value.name: $rightPilot
set_value.exact: if $rightShip? and $rightShip.exists and $rightShip.pilot? and $rightShip.pilot.exists then $rightShip.pilot else null

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PostSwap LEFT missing pilot ship=' + $leftShip.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' default=' + (if $leftShip.defaultorder? then @$leftShip.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ' current=' + (if $leftShip.order? then @$leftShip.order.id else 'NONE')

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwap RIGHT missing pilot ship=' + $rightShip.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' default=' + (if $rightShip.defaultorder? then @$rightShip.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ' current=' + (if $rightShip.order? then @$rightShip.order.id else 'NONE')

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwap LEFT before sync ship=' + $leftShip.idcode + ' pilot=' + $leftPilotNameDbg + ' pilotId=' + $leftPilotIdDbg + ' default=' + (if $leftShip.defaultorder? then @$leftShip.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ' current=' + (if $leftShip.order? then @$leftShip.order.id else 'NONE')
'[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh hard-fail: left pilot missing in GT registry after forced sync pilot=' + $leftPilotNameDbg + ' ship=' + $leftShip.idcode

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwap LEFT after sync ship=' + $leftShip.idcode + ' pilot=' + $leftPilotNameDbg + ' pilotId=' + $leftPilotIdDbg + ' gtPilotRegistered=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$leftPilot}? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' gtShipRegistered=' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$leftShip}? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' pilotExchange=' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$leftShip}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$leftShip}.$PilotExchange? then global.$GT_Ships.{$leftShip}.$PilotExchange else 'NONE')

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwap RIGHT before sync ship=' + $rightShip.idcode + ' pilot=' + $rightPilotNameDbg + ' pilotId=' + $rightPilotIdDbg + ' default=' + (if $rightShip.defaultorder? then @$rightShip.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ' current=' + (if $rightShip.order? then @$rightShip.order.id else 'NONE')
'[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh hard-fail: right pilot missing in GT registry after forced sync pilot=' + $rightPilotNameDbg + ' ship=' + $rightShip.idcode

'[GT Redistribute] PostSwap RIGHT after sync ship=' + $rightShip.idcode + ' pilot=' + $rightPilotNameDbg + ' pilotId=' + $rightPilotIdDbg + ' gtPilotRegistered=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$rightPilot}? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' gtShipRegistered=' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$rightShip}? then 'yes' else 'no') + ' pilotExchange=' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$rightShip}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$rightShip}.$PilotExchange? then global.$GT_Ships.{$rightShip}.$PilotExchange else 'NONE')
